prevalence.trend: stable; rheumatic heart disease remains a risk factor

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Modified Duke criteria; blood cultures and echocardiography (TTE/TEE)

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; limited by delayed diagnosis and surgical access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Blood cultures and echocardiography in tertiary hospitals
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Prolonged IV antibiotics; surgery for complications or prosthetic infection
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Delayed diagnosis and limited access to cardiac surgery in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Tertiary centers with cardiology and cardiac surgery services
